basic_details.job_title: Hindustan Aeronautics Ltd Hyderabad Apprentices Recruitment 2026 – Walk in for 132 Diploma, Engineer, Graduate Apprentices Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Avionics Division, Hyderabad (A Maharatna CPSE)
basic_details.post_name: Technician (Diploma) Apprentice, Engineering Graduate Apprentice, General Stream Graduate Apprentice
basic_details.department: Department of Training & Development, Avionics Division, HAL Hyderabad
basic_details.job_location: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, Avionics Division, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042
basic_details.short_information: The Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Avionics Division, Hyderabad has officially announced the Technician (Diploma) Apprentice, Engineering Graduate Apprentice, and General Stream Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026 with 132 openings. The detailed notification was published on 11.05.2026 at HAL Official Website. Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria of having passed the respective Diploma, Engineering, or General Graduation within the last 5 years can now attend the walk-in interviews from 02-06-2026 to 05-06-2026. Direct links to download the notification and pre-register on the N

qualification.details: Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination and possess Original/Provisional Certificate to be eligible. The gap between the date of contract after joining apprenticeship and the date of passing the qualification should not be more than 5 years for all categories. Candidates who have already undergone Apprenticeship Training or who are undergoing similar apprenticeship training or are registered for Apprenticeship Training in the respective qualification under the Apprentices Act 1961 elsewhere are not eligible. Candidates who have already joined/are pursuing/are about to join any regular courses for higher education during the stipulated Training Period need not apply. OBC candidates must produce a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate. | Category-wise Eligibility | Reservation | Reservations for engagement of Apprentices shall be applicable for EWS, OBC, SC, ST, PH Candidates, Ex-Servicemen as per the Apprentices Act 1961 & Rules and subsequent amendments and for wards of HAL as per HAL Corporate Office Guidelines. OBC candidates must produce a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate.

vacancy_details.Qualification / Category: Engineering Graduates – ECE, Civil & Aeronautical Engg.
Engineering Graduates – EEE, CSE & Mechanical Engg.

salary_details.pay_scale: As per the Apprentices Act 1961 & Rules and subsequent amendments (paid monthly)

selection_process: Stage 1 Mandatory pre-registration on https://nats.education.gov.in portal
Stage 2 Walk-in on the respective category/discipline date with all original documents and photocopies
Stage 3 Merit-based shortlisting on CGPA/Percentage of marks in Diploma/Engineering Degree/General Stream Graduation
Stage 4 Merit list published on www.hal-india.co.in on 30-06-2026; confirmation emails sent to shortlisted candidates

Selection is based only on CGPA/Percentage of marks secured in Diploma/Engineering Degree/Graduation in General Stream. There will be no written test or interview. Merit list of provisionally shortlisted candidates shall be hosted on www.hal-india.co.in on 30th June 2026 and confirmation emails shall be forwarded to shortlisted candidates subsequently.

The date of joining/reporting for the Apprenticeship is 27th July 2026. All provisionally shortlisted candidates must be in a position to join by the prescribed date. If a candidate does not report by the scheduled date
it will be assumed that he/she is not interested in the apprenticeship and the candidature will be forfeited. This Apprenticeship Training does not guarantee employment at HAL.
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates must walk-in on the respective date as per the category/discipline-wise schedule at Utsav Sadan Auditorium, Behind Department of Training & Development, Hindustan Aeronautics Limited, Avionics Division, Balanagar, Hyderabad – 500042. There is no separate online application on the HAL website. Candidates must pre-register on the NATS portal at https://nats.education.gov.in before attending the walk-in interview.

Before appearing for the walk-in, candidates must ensure they meet all the requisite eligibility criteria and that all particulars furnished are true and correct in all aspects. Submission of false/incorrect information or suppression of any facts at any stage will result in immediate cancellation/termination of candidature. Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation and travelling for the walk-in process and joining the apprenticeship.
Documents Required at the Time of Walk-in:
Birth Certificate (in case Date of Birth is not mentioned in SSC Certificate)
Degree / Diploma Certificate marks sheets (all semesters or consolidated mark sheet)
Original / Provisional Certificate of qualifying Degree / Diploma
Reservation / Community / Caste Certificate (SC, ST, OBC, EWS, XSM, PWD/PH) – if applicable
One set of Photo copy / Xerox copy of all the above certificates
important_instructions: Selection is purely merit-based on CGPA/Percentage of marks in Diploma/Engineering Degree/Graduation in General Stream; there will be no written test or interview. Pre-registration on the NATS portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) is mandatory before appearing for the walk-in interview. Only candidates who have passed the qualifying examination and possess Original/Provisional Certificate are eligible. The gap between the date of contract after joining apprenticeship and the date of passing the qualification should not be more than 5 years for all categories. Candidates who have already undergone or are currently undergoing Apprenticeship Training or are registered for Apprenticeship Training under the Apprentices Act 1961 elsewhere are not eligible. Candidates who have already joined/are pursuing/are about to join any regular courses for higher education during the stipulated Training Period need not apply. OBC candidates must produce a valid Non-Creamy Layer certificate. Merit list of selected candidates will be published on www.hal-india.co.in on 30th June 2026. Date of joining/reporting for the Apprenticeship is 27th July 2026; failure to report by the scheduled date will result in forfeiture of candidature. Submission of false/incorrect information or suppression of any facts at any stage will result in immediate cancellation/termination of candidature. Canvassing in any form shall lead to disqualification of the candidature. HAL reserves the right to alter the allocation of quota for trades at any time and to cancel the advertisement/selection process; HAL Management's decision regarding selection will be final. Candidates must make their own arrangements for accommodation and travelling for the walk-in process and joining. For further queries/clarifications, email: [email protected] or contact: 040-23778283 (09:00 Hrs to 16:00 Hrs).

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in HAL Hyderabad Diploma & Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Hindustan Aeronautics Limited (HAL), Avionics Division, Hyderabad has notified 132 apprentice vacancies including 30 Diploma Technician, 34 General Stream Graduate, and 68 Engineering Graduate Apprentice posts for FY 2026-27.

faq.question: Q2. What are the walk-in dates for HAL Hyderabad Diploma, Engineering and General Graduate Apprentices 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in schedule is category-wise: Engineering Graduates (ECE, Civil, Aeronautical) on 02 June 2026, Engineering Graduates (EEE, CSE, Mechanical) on 03 June 2026, General Stream Graduates on 04 June 2026, and Diploma Technicians on 05 June 2026, all reporting at 9:00 AM.

faq.question: Q3. What is the selection process for HAL Hyderabad Diploma & Graduate Apprentice Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is purely merit-based on CGPA/percentage of marks in the qualifying Diploma, Engineering Degree or General Stream Degree, and there is no written test or interview for these apprentice posts.

faq.question: Q4. Is NATS registration mandatory for HAL Hyderabad Diploma and Graduate Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Yes, pre-registration on the NATS portal at https://nats.education.gov.in is mandatory for all Diploma, Engineering Graduate, and General Stream Graduate candidates before attending the walk-in.

faq.question: Q5. What is the stipend for HAL Hyderabad Diploma & Graduate Apprentices 2026-27?
faq.answer: Apprentices will receive a monthly stipend as per the Apprentices Act 1961 and its rules and amendments, with different rates applicable for Diploma and Graduate apprentices as notified by HAL and BoAT.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility criteria for HAL Hyderabad Engineering Graduate Apprentices 2026?
faq.answer: Engineering Graduate Apprentice candidates must have completed a Degree in Engineering/Technology in the relevant branch from a recognized university, with the gap between passing and the apprenticeship contract date not exceeding 5 years.

faq.question: Q7. Who is not eligible for HAL Hyderabad Diploma & Graduate Apprentice 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates are not eligible if they have already undergone or are undergoing apprenticeship training, are registered for apprenticeship elsewhere under the Apprentices Act, or are already pursuing/are about to join regular higher education during the training period.

faq.question: Q8. When will the HAL Hyderabad Diploma & Graduate Apprentice 2026 merit list be released?
faq.answer: The merit list of provisionally shortlisted candidates is scheduled to be published on the official HAL website www.hal-india.co.in on 30 June 2026.
